info.title: new-api Resource Center API
info.summary: Assets, asynchronous image tasks, uploads, and Webhooks.
info.description: Public Resource Center API. Async image tasks, uploads, and assets use the same normal new-api token. Account-level task Webhooks are configured in the Resource Center console.

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: Read generated assets with a normal new-api token.

tags.name: Async Images
tags.description: Create and query durable image generation/edit tasks.

tags.name: Image Uploads
tags.description: Upload temporary URL inputs before creating an edit task.

get.description: Lists only assets owned by the API token user.

parameters.name: asset_type
parameters.description: Filter by asset type.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Public APIs return available assets.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Filter by exact task ID.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Filter by exact model.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter by internal task platform name.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Filter by task action.

parameters.name: channel_id
parameters.description: Filter by channel ID.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Search asset ID, task ID, filename, or URL.

parameters.name: start_timestamp
parameters.description: Minimum creation time in Unix seconds.

parameters.name: end_timestamp
parameters.description: Maximum creation time in Unix seconds.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number. Alias: p.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Page size. Aliases: ps and size.

parameters.name: asset_id
parameters.description: Asset ID such as asset_xxx.

post.summary: Query assets in a JSON body

parameters.name: asset_type
parameters.description: Filter by asset type.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Public APIs return available assets.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Filter by exact task ID.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Filter by exact model.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter by internal task platform name.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Filter by task action.

parameters.name: channel_id
parameters.description: Filter by channel ID.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Search asset ID, task ID, filename, or URL.

parameters.name: start_timestamp
parameters.description: Minimum creation time in Unix seconds.

parameters.name: end_timestamp
parameters.description: Maximum creation time in Unix seconds.

200.description: CSV with asset_id, task_id, asset_type, url, filename, model, platform, action, and created_at.

post.description: Returns immediately after the task, billing reservation, credential lease, and durable dispatch are stored. Reusing an Idempotency-Key with the same normalized request returns the original task.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional caller key, unique per user. Maximum 128 characters.

Idempotent-Replayed.description: true when the original task is replayed.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by one public task status.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Filter by generation or edit.

parameters.name: client_reference_id
parameters.description: Filter by the caller business reference.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Exclusive lower creation-time bound in Unix seconds.

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Exclusive upper creation-time bound in Unix seconds.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Task ID cursor returned by the previous page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Public task ID such as task_xxx.

post.description: Returned tasks preserve request order. Unknown or unauthorized IDs are listed in missing.

200.description: Ordered task list with missing IDs.

post.summary: Upload image inputs as multipart data
post.description: Accepts up to 10 repeated image files and one mask. Each PNG, JPEG, or WebP file is limited to 20 MiB and the request to 100 MiB. Temporary URLs should be submitted to a task promptly.
Accepts plain base64 or data URLs. Use images plus optional mask, or uploads with an optional field value of image or mask.
Sent once with Authorization: Bearer wk-.... The receiver response is ignored and failed connections are not retried.

default.description: Optional receiver response. new-api ignores the status and body.

post.description: Sent once with Authorization: Bearer wk-.... The receiver response is ignored and failed connections are not retried.

default.description: Optional receiver response. new-api ignores the status and body.

TokenAuth.description: A normal new-api token authorized for the requested image model.

WebhookBearerAuth.description: new-api generates this Key for the account-level task Webhook. The account owner can reveal, copy, or regenerate it in the Resource Center.

oneOf.description: Plain base64 or an image data URL.

Forbidden.description: API Key, IP, expiry, or user policy denied access.

NotFound.description: The resource was not found for the authenticated user.

PayloadTooLarge.description: Upload request or file is too large.

ServiceUnavailable.description: The internal upload service is not configured.
